content: Existing single-perspective Self-Refine frameworks for LLMs can be enhanced by integrating multiple inconsistent self-reflection perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanism research, creating a multi-perspective iterative self-refinement pipeline that improves output quality without adding external data or training overhead. This pipeline leverages the inconsistency between different self-generated solving perspectives to catch more blind spots in initial outputs that a single self-feedback loop would miss.
